issue_title: Allow asset loaders to call other asset loaders - the "gzip" problem
issue_body:
The feature request is simple: Process one asset and pass it to the next asset loader.

This should be possible:
- Asset loader exists for extensions "gz", "tar.gz"
- Asset loader decompresses the asset
- Asset loader sends to the next asset loader

In example:
I have a "my_image.svg.gz", which I want to be ungzipped, before my svg asset loader takes it.
pr_title: Added Method to Allow Pipelined Asset Loading
